creator: gemini@geminix.org
text:
Just to give some assistance: It is already fixed upstream on GitHub:

https://github.com/Exim/exim/commit/c57309a50444d858c0a2dc1581846a850d78a9ad

I applied the relevant part of this patch (tls.c) locally to Exim 4.95 from ports, since my MTA box ran out of file descriptors this morning, and can confirm that with the patch the leak is gone.

Since this is a pretty serious issue I suggest to also do a MFH to the quarterly ports branch.

Best regards,

   Uwe
